title: JRZD-459 First Shooting Married Woman Document Yuna Serizawa
overview: This time, Yuna Serizawa is 31 years old. She is married to her husband, a lawyer whom she has known since she was a student, and is also working hard as a career woman at a securities company. However, both husband and wife are too busy to actually have sex life after marriage. "When I was in my 20s, I enjoyed working all the time, but when I turned 30, I started wanting children, and I wondered if this was really okay for me as a woman..." A wife who can no longer endure the daily misunderstandings with her husband. Explodes the accumulated anger and libido in front of the camera!
